subtitles.original: 今日でサヨナラ 胸が苦しい
subtitles.english: Time to say goodbye today, my heart is aching.

subtitles.original: 手紙書いていいんだろう？
subtitles.english: Is just writing you a letter enough?

subtitles.original: 青春バスガイド 君はまぶしい
subtitles.english: My dazzling youth bus guide, you are so beautiful.

subtitles.original: 記念に写真とっていいかい
subtitles.english: Will you let me take a picture of you to not forget?
It was love at first sight, it's true.
I felt my heart would explode.
This sensation won't leave me be.
I'm not dreaming, is it love?
You walk past me in my bus seat...
...and you smell so alluring.

subtitles.original: みんなに優しくするなよ
subtitles.english: Don't be so kind to everyone.
I want to have you all to myself...

subtitles.original: その声 その笑顔全部
subtitles.english: ...that loving voice and that sparkling smile.

subtitles.original: 目線が合う度 しびれるよ
subtitles.english: When I meet your gaze, it is like I'm paralyzed.
I want to have you all to myself!

subtitles.original: だけどサヨナラ 胸が苦しい
subtitles.english: I tell you goodbye, although my heart is aching.
I want to talk to you more deeply now.

subtitles.original: 青春バスガイド 君はまぶしい
subtitles.english: My dazzling youth bus guide, you are so beautiful.

subtitles.original: マイクに生まれ変わりたい
subtitles.english: I want to be reborn as your bus microphone.
That guy is a rival, too.
He's talking to you.
I am bursting with this feeling...
...this is jealousy.
During the break time...
...I was able to talk to you.

subtitles.original: まつげがとても長いんだね
subtitles.english: Your eyelashes are gorgeously long, I noticed.
Keeper of the clock, turn back time.

subtitles.original: 最初の日にもどりたい
subtitles.english: Until it is the beginning of the day again.

subtitles.original: 君に伝えたいことばかり
subtitles.english: I want to tell you of all the feelings that I have.
Please, oh please, just turn the time backwards!
I want to have you all to myself...

subtitles.original: その声 その笑顔全部
subtitles.english: ...that loving voice and that sparkling smile.

subtitles.original: 目線が合う度 しびれるよ
subtitles.english: When I meet your gaze, it is like I'm paralyzed.
I want to have you all to myself!

subtitles.original: 今日でサヨナラ 胸が苦しい
subtitles.english: Time to say goodbye today, my heart is aching.

subtitles.original: 手紙書いていいんだろう？
subtitles.english: Is just writing you a letter enough?

subtitles.original: 青春バスガイド 君はまぶしい
subtitles.english: My dazzling youth bus guide, you are so beautiful.

subtitles.original: 記念に写真とっていいかい
subtitles.english: Will you let me take a picture of you to not forget?

subtitles.original: だけどサヨナラ 胸が苦しい
subtitles.english: I tell you goodbye, although my heart is aching.
I want to talk to you more deeply now.

subtitles.original: 青春バスガイド 君はまぶしい
subtitles.english: My dazzling youth bus guide, you are so beautiful.

subtitles.original: もう一度君に会いたいよ
subtitles.english: My only wish is to gaze into your eyes again.
Spe...
...cial...
...gene...
...tion!
Wow wow wow wow yeah

subtitles.original: どうたらこうたら 言い訳してる
subtitles.english: No matter how you put it, you're making excuses.
You're getting on my nerves.
If that girl's so great...

subtitles.original: そっち行けばいいじゃん
subtitles.english: ...why don't you just go with her?

subtitles.original: チャラチャラチャラチャラ シルバー着けて
subtitles.english: You're dressed up all flashily, with silver on.
You're staggering about...
...who are you trying to appeal to?

subtitles.original: よそ見なんて許さないわよ
subtitles.english: I won't forgive you for looking away!

subtitles.original: 好きと 好きと 好きと 好きと言いなさい
subtitles.english: Say that you love me, love me, love me, love me!
Yes, right here!

subtitles.original: スッペシャル ジェネレーション LOVE
subtitles.english: Special generation LOVE!
I want to believe in fate.
Even if a million years pass...
...this love will remain unshakable.

subtitles.original: スッペシャル ジェネレーション LOVE
subtitles.english: Special generation LOVE!
I can't ever bring myself to hate you.

subtitles.original: 地下鉄の中だって 愛して！
subtitles.english: Even in the subway, love me!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Project - My Approach**

Right, here's the game plan. The task is clear: I need to generate subtitles for this video, adhering to very specific rules. It's a two-song video: "Seishun Bus Guide" followed by "Special Generation". I'm aiming for flawless transcription and translation. That means matching the Japanese audio exactly and then rendering a natural, context-aware English translation. I'll nail the start and end timestamps at the millisecond. No captioning tags, strict 50-character limit per line.

First, "Seishun Bus Guide." I've meticulously broken down the song into snippets of audio, cross-referencing to official lyric documents, focusing closely on aligning the Japanese text with the precise audio. I re-listened to each of the pieces of the song, checking for timing accuracy against the reference, and making any needed adjustments. I made sure to refine any segment that needed it, like the combination of the first two lines, and the vocal start of the second song. I meticulously checked each of the subtitles for timing accuracy against the audio cues.

Then, there's a smooth transition to "Special Generation," with Kiara's stylistic vocalizations, so that called for special handling. I pinpointed the exact timings for each stylized part: "スッ," "ペ," "シャ," "ル," and "ジェネレーション！" and translated accordingly. Then, I tackled the rest of the second song, taking the same precise approach as the first. I've re-listened to each phrase, cross-referencing them, to ensure the synchronization is pinpoint. I re-checked the timings for both songs for absolute accuracy and optimized the translation. I've double checked for precision, and can proudly render it.
